given: Sentry group index delete helper handles request shapes where no branch assigns group_list

should_find.finding: the delete helper can reach the empty-list check without group_list being assigned, causing an UnboundLocalError for request shapes outside the populated if/elif branches

notes.body: Regression seed from Sentry fix 4cab626b98ac3df88b0dd9c90161e43c806388b7. the delete helper can reach the empty-list check without group_list being assigned, causing an UnboundLocalError for request shapes outside the populated if/elif branches
